title: Open models seize the lead as proprietary labs leak - TCR 06/21/26
description:
Chinese open-weight models including Qwen, DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, and MiniMax now command the majority of token use across OpenRouter's top ten - up from under 2% in 2024 - as Google DeepMind lost Nobel laureate John Jumper to Anthropic and Transformer co-author Noam Shazeer to OpenAI in one week, and a Gallup poll found just 1% of laid-off workers lost their jobs to AI.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-june-21-2026/

0:00 Opening
0:40 DeepMind loses Jumper and Shazeer
3:03 Ben Goertzel's crypto bet for open AGI
4:42 The AI-displacement story meets the layoff data
7:18 Russia's AI push hits the chips it cannot make
9:34 Voice-controlled super-resolution ultrasound
11:44 Europe 2031 doomsday scenario goes viral
14:22 Synthesis and Closing

This episode covers the open-model insurgency and DeepMind's talent exits, Ben Goertzel's crypto bet for open AGI through SingularityNET, the AI-displacement story versus the Gallup layoff data and Lloyds' 300-person hiring drive, Russia's AI talent push hitting its domestic chip constraint, and a voice-controlled super-resolution ultrasound that writes its own diagnostic report in four minutes.

Five threads pulled in one direction: the assumption that concentration produces durable advantage is leaking from every side. Open weights anyone can download out-ship the fenced frontier on token use, while the minds the labs treated as a moat walk across institutional walls - Jumper to Anthropic, Shazeer to OpenAI - in a single week. Goertzel answers by spreading the first AGI across a network in fifty countries rather than a hyperscaler's farm. The displacement panic meets the data: 1% of laid-off workers blamed AI, a quarter were fully remote, and a 261-year-old bank is hiring 300 people to build its AI layer. Russia can recruit talent but cannot fabricate the chips, the honest constraint beneath all the sovereignty rhetoric. And a voice command now drives super-resolution ultrasound to a finished report in four minutes on open-weight models a hospital could own. The grip is loosening everywhere at once.
